must_have_skills: JIRA or equivalent project management tools
MS Project or similar planning tools
nice_to_have_skills: Experience with SAFe or other scaled agile frameworks
Technical background or understanding of software development
Experience with data analytics or AI projects
core_problems_to_solve: The successful candidate will lead cross-functional initiatives, define project scope and deliverables, manage stakeholders and project resources, identify and mitigate risks, and ensure projects are delivered on time and within budget. The role requires driving successful project delivery and managing vendor relationships. The candidate will also be responsible for maintaining project documentation and driving continuous improvement in project management processes.
